p: This session extended the Israel stock research Telegram bot with two major capabilities: financial Q&A (per-stock income statements, balance sheets via get_financials) and broad stock screening across all 86 major TASE stocks (screen_stocks). Several data quality bugs were fixed: delisted TASE tickers (ITRN, KRNT) removed from all config locations, valuation multiples (P/E, P/B, dividend yield, margins) are now correctly passed to the sector LLM for scoring, and the live-scan tool now always returns the current price and daily change so "what is X doing right now?" questions are answered with data.

ul.li: The bot could not answer fundamental questions like "What was Ayalon's revenue last year?" or "Which Israeli stock has the cheapest P/E?"

The sector LLM scoring agents received technical data (RSI, MAs, price) but not valuation multiples — P/E, P/B, margins, dividend yield were fetched from Yahoo Finance but silently dropped before reaching the LLM prompt.
Two delisted tickers (ITRN.TA — Ituran, KRNT.TA — Kornit Digital) caused Yahoo Finance errors every 15-minute cycle.
Asking "what is TEVA doing right now?" returned only anomaly signals or "No anomalies detected" — never a plain price/daily-change answer.

tr.td: Added _fmt_financial(), _tool_financials(), _tool_screen_stocks(); extended _KNOWN_TICKERS with 20+ entries + 4 name corrections; registered new tools; added financial_query / screening_query intents; fixed _tool_live_scan() to always show price + daily change
Added refresh_financial_snapshot_cache() — fetches yf.Ticker.info for all 86 TASE_MAJOR_TICKERS once per day
Added financial_query / screening_query intents to _INTENT_SYSTEM; added FINANCIAL DATA FORMATTING section to _CHAT_ANSWER_SYSTEM
Fixed _deep_analyze() to pass pe_trailing, pe_forward, price_to_book, dividend_yield, gross_margin, net_margin, debt_to_equity to sector LLM
Added daily financial snapshot cache refresh trigger in main loop
Removed ITRN.TA and KRNT.TA from DUAL_LISTED_STOCKS, SECTOR_TICKERS, and TASE_MAJOR_TICKERS
Updated delisted stocks section with ITRN, KRNT, SILC notes

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body:
@startuml skinparam state { BackgroundColor LightBlue BorderColor DarkBlue }
[*] --> LOAD_STATE
LOAD_STATE : load_state() from JSON LOAD_STATE --> FIN_CACHE_CHECK
FIN_CACHE_CHECK : last_financial_cache_refresh == today? FIN_CACHE_CHECK --> PHASE1 : yes (skip) FIN_CACHE_CHECK --> REFRESH_FIN_CACHE : no
REFRESH_FIN_CACHE : refresh_financial_snapshot_cache()
86 tickers × yf.Ticker.info REFRESH_FIN_CACHE --> PHASE1
PHASE1 : Maya filings (Playwright)
DualListed overnight moves
Israeli news RSS
Macro snapshot PHASE1 --> PHASE2
PHASE2 : 7 Sector Agents in parallel
(Banks, TechDefense, Energy, Pharma,
RealEstate, TelecomConsumer, Discovery) PHASE2 --> PHASE3
PHASE3 : Manager LLM arbitration
CIO picks stock of week PHASE3 --> ALERTS
ALERTS : send_quick_alerts() if enabled
daily_summary() after 17:00
weekly_report() Thursday 17:00 ALERTS --> SAVE_STATE
SAVE_STATE : save_state() to JSON
update stock_memory Excel SAVE_STATE --> SLEEP
SLEEP : time.sleep(scan_interval_seconds)
default 900s / 15 min SLEEP --> LOAD_STATE @enduml

@startuml actor User participant "BotServer
(daemon thread)" as BOT participant "QAPipeline" as QA participant "LLMAnalyst
plan_intent()" as INTENT participant "Tool Registry
(11 tools)" as TOOLS participant "LLMAnalyst
chat_answer()" as ANSWER participant "Telegram" as TG
User -> BOT : free-text message BOT -> TG : "Analyzing..." placeholder BOT -> QA : answer(question, state) QA -> INTENT : plan_intent(question, ticker_list, tool_catalogue) INTENT --> QA : {ticker, intent, tools[], language}
alt intent == direct_answer QA -> ANSWER : chat_answer(question, "", history) else tools to run loop for each tool QA -> TOOLS : execute tool(ticker, state) TOOLS --> QA : context string end QA -> ANSWER : chat_answer(question, context, history) end
ANSWER --> QA : plain-text answer QA --> BOT : answer text BOT -> TG : edit placeholder → real answer TG -> User : answer (chunked ≤4096 chars) @enduml

@startuml [*] --> EMPTY : bot starts / state reset
EMPTY : state["financial_snapshot_cache"] = {} EMPTY : screen_stocks returns
"cache not yet populated" EMPTY --> REFRESHING : first cycle of the day
(last_financial_cache_refresh != today)
REFRESHING : refresh_financial_snapshot_cache()
fetches 86 tickers × yf.info
~30-60 seconds REFRESHING --> POPULATED : all 86 tickers fetched
state["last_financial_cache_refresh"] = today
POPULATED : screen_stocks reads cache
returns full 86-row table POPULATED : get_stock_data still live (not cached) POPULATED --> STALE : next calendar day
STALE : cache has yesterday's data
screen_stocks still works
but data is 24h old STALE --> REFRESHING : next research cycle triggers refresh @enduml

h3: 1. Financial tools added to QA pipeline
2. Valuation multiples now sent to sector LLM

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body:
# base.py _deep_analyze() — BEFORE (dropped valuation data) result[tkr] = { k: data[k] for k in ("rsi_14", "ma_20", "ma_50", "ma_trend", "last_price", "52w_high", "52w_low", "avg_volume", "today_change_pct", "pct_vs_52w_high", "market_cap", "revenue_growth_pct", "net_income_growth_pct") if k in data }
# AFTER — now includes valuation multiples for sector LLM scoring result[tkr] = { k: data[k] for k in ("rsi_14", "ma_20", "ma_50", "ma_trend", "last_price", "52w_high", "52w_low", "avg_volume", "today_change_pct", "pct_vs_52w_high", "market_cap", "revenue_growth_pct", "net_income_growth_pct", "pe_trailing", "pe_forward", "price_to_book", "dividend_yield", "gross_margin", "net_margin", "debt_to_equity") if k in data }

h3: 3. Live scan always returns price data

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body:
# _tool_live_scan — now fetches price first so "current move" questions always get data d = DeepStockAnalyzer().analyze(ticker_yf) lp = d.get("last_price") chg = d.get("today_change_pct") note = d.get("price_data_note", "last_session") if lp: label = "intraday" if note == "intraday" else "last session" sign = "+" if chg >= 0 else "" price_line = f"Price: ₪{lp} ({sign}{chg:.2f}% {label})" if chg is not None else f"Price: ₪{lp}"
# If no anomaly triggered (move < 3.5%), user still gets price data: # "No anomalies detected for TEVA right now. # Price: ₪151.20 (+0.5% last session)"

tr.td: "Which TASE stock has the cheapest P/E?"

ul.li: Send bot: "What was Ayalon's revenue last year?" → should return annual income statement table
Send bot: "מה הרווח של בזק ברבעון האחרון?" → Hebrew financial query for BEZQ
Send bot: "Which Israeli stock has the cheapest P/E?" → should return sorted screening table
Send bot: "What is TEVA doing right now?" → should show price + daily change even if no anomaly
Send bot: "What is the highest dividend yield TASE stock?" → screening_query sorted by dividend_yield
After system starts: check state JSON has financial_snapshot_cache with ~86 entries
Check logs: [FinSnap] Daily financial snapshot refreshed (86 tickers) once per day
Financial snapshot cache is populated once per day — first run of a new day may serve stale data until the refresh completes (~30–60s)
TASE stocks on Yahoo Finance provide end-of-day data only; "last session" change is not real-time intraday
Some TASE small-caps have no P/E or revenue data in Yahoo Finance — get_financials returns "No data available" for these
Hebrew ticker name matching in _KNOWN_TICKERS is manual — new companies must be added explicitly
